mapper.select: /* oms-master-serviceOrType-sql-oracle.xml selectOrTypeDt */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , M.OWKEY , #{hddtdiv} AS HDDTDIV , M.ORDERTYPECD , M.ORDERTYPENM , A.COLUMN_NAME AS SOCOLUMN , COALESCE(B.COMMENTS, A.COLUMN_NAME) AS SOCOLUMNCOMMENT , COALESCE(C.REQRDYN, 'N') AS REQRDYN , C.DEFVAL , COALESCE(C.DELYN, 'N') AS DELYN , C.INSERTDATE , C.INSERTURKEY , C.UPDATEDATE , C.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_MST_ORTYPE M JOIN USER_TAB_COLUMNS A ON A.TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} LEFT JOIN USER_COL_COMMENTS B ON A.TABLE_NAME = B.TABLE_NAME AND A.COLUMN_NAME = B.COLUMN_NAME LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_CHK C ON M.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND M.ORDERTYPECD = C.ORDERTYPECD AND C.HDDTDIV = #{hddtdiv} AND A.COLUMN_NAME = C.SOCOLUMN WHERE M.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND M.ORDERTYPECD = #{orTypeCd} ORDER BY A.COLUMN_ID
